After that, let the mixture sit. Then, you should heat the mixture. Finally, you should enjoy your creation. Wait, what was I talking about? I was talking about how to make sourdough bread. Anyway, getting back to the bread, the most important part of the process is the patience. You need to let the dough rise for at least four hours. This allows the flavors to develop. Once the dough has risen, you can shape it into loaves. After the loaves are shaped, you should let them rise again for another hour. Then, bake them in the oven at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for about 45 minutes. You will know the bread is done when it is golden brown and sounds hollow when you tap the bottom.
